urdu transliteration text: Tha ye Banu ka bayaan,kis ko doon ab loriyan
english translation text: This was Banu’s lamentation,for whom shall I sing lullabies

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: The mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Tera jhoola jal gayaai mere tishna dahaan
english translation text: You cradle is now burnt, O’ my thirsty child

urdu transliteration text: Khoon bhara kurta tera,haye vo bhi chin gaya
english translation text: Your blood- soaked shirt, even that was plundered (by the enemy)

urdu transliteration text: Ab jeeyun kis ke saharepaas mere kya raha
english translation text: How can I live without a reminder of you, what do I have left now?

urdu transliteration text: Zindagi hai raaegaanumr bhar hun noha khwan
english translation text: Life is now worthless, I will mourn for you the rest of my days

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: The mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text:
That delicate neck, parched for three days
Haye wo nazuk galateen din say khushq tha
Bhar kay mojay teer nay woiss qadar zakhmi kiya
english translation text: The tip of the flying arrow, inflicted an injury so grave

urdu transliteration text: Thar huwi khoon say zabaanle sake na hichkiyan
english translation text: Blood drowned the tongue, you could not breathe your last

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: The mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Khaali jhoola daikh kerai mere noor-e-nazar
english translation text: Seeing the empty cradle, O’ the light of my eyes

urdu transliteration text: Aankh faryradi hai meri aur rota hai jigar
english translation text: My eyes tear up, and my heart weeps

urdu transliteration text: So gaye ho tum kahanchayn paaey kaisay maa
english translation text: Where are you sleeping, how can I find some solace

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: The mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Mei musafir shaam kikhatm hud araam ki
english translation text: I am a captive going to Shaam, my rest is over

urdu transliteration text: Qaid ho ker jaa rahi hoongard hai alaam ki
english translation text: I am going as a prisoner, the dust is all that is left

urdu transliteration text: Bandh chuki hai reesmahum kaha aur tum kaha
english translation text: The ropes have bound (our hands), we are so far apart, where am I and where are you

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: The mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Meer kya rehan kyajis ne ye noha suna
english translation text: Not only Meer and Rehan, but whoever hears this Noha

urdu transliteration text:
Cries Tears of Blood and Says
Ashk ankhon se baha kerus ne ro ro ker kaha
Haay wo asghar ki maauff wo tera imtihaan
english translation text: O The Mother of Asghar,You Went Through Difficult Trials

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: The mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'

urdu transliteration text: Jaam ashkon kay peeyoaaj ki shab so raho
english translation text: Quench your thirst with tears,fall asleep on this night

urdu transliteration text: umr lag jaey humaritum ko tum jeetay raho
english translation text: May my life end so you can live on

urdu transliteration text: Tum pe qurban meri jaanai qaraar-e-be kasaan
english translation text: My life be sacrificed for you,O my brave and lonely child

urdu transliteration text: Dhoond thi phirti hai madar, hai mera Asghar kahan
english translation text: Your mother kept searching profusely and saying 'where is my Asghar?'
